ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size */,
  "us_size" REAL /* US shoe size */,
  "eu_size" REAL /* EU shoe size */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "inches" REAL /* Shoe size in inches */,
  "cm" REAL /* Shoe size in centimeters */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of shoe size (e.g., men's, women's, kids') */,
  "size_conversion_source" TEXT /* Source of the size conversion data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the product */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe size */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe size */,
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_conversion_id") REFERENCES size_conversions ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (individual or business) */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first made a purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the product ordered */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_item_sizes" (
  "order_item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item size */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_item_sizes_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, convert) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., admin, sales, customer) */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Specific action performed during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each shoe size
Type of shoe size (e.g., men's, women's, kids')
Source of the size conversion data
Unique identifier for each size conversion
Unique identifier for each product size
Date when the customer first made a purchase
